title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Pregnant women at any stage of pregnancy Hours: Monday/Wednesday 8am-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday, 8am-5pm (541) 766-6835 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6835 Oregon MothersCare INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the Benton County Sunset Building Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV CASE MANAGEMENT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
